title: Lili Reinhart Says a ‘Male Director Came Up to Me’ on Set and Said: ‘Just Suck in Your Stomach a Little Bit’
content:
ByZack Sharf

Digital News Director

“Riverdale” and “Forbidden Fruits” actorLili Reinhartrecently took part in a video interview for Cosmopolitan magazine and revealed that a male director once told her to “suck in her stomach a little bit” in between takes. Reinhart did not reveal the male director’s name.

Joined by her “Forbidden Fruits” co-stars Lola Tung, Victoria Pedretti and Alexandra Shipp, Reinhart was asked to name the “acting note that she took personally.” She did not hesitate to answer: “When I had a male director come up to me and silently lean over and go, ‘Just suck in your stomach a little bit.'”

The revelation prompted gasps from the “Forbidden Fruit” casts, with Pedretti saying: “Oh my God. What is his name? And what is his address?” Tung shouted: ‘Time for a hex! Time for hex!’ When Reinhart said she would tell her castmates the director’s name later in private, Shipp urged: “Say his name!”

Reinhart has spoken openly over the years about her battle with body dysmorphia. She developed an eating disorder as a result while playing Betty Cooper on The CW’s “Riverdale.”

“I really don’t like looking at season six imagery or pictures, because I know that 99% of my thoughts were about my body,” she toldSelf Magazinelast year. “I was a thousand percent just disassociated through that entire day or scene because my entire inner dialogue is just … ‘Your body’s changing.’”

She made headlines in 2023 for posting on X: “I wish there were more average-sized arms represented in mainstream media for women. My body dysmorphia has been going crazy because I feel like my arms need to be half the size they are currently. We’ve glamorized these skinny arms that, for most of us, can only be achieved if you’re a literal adolescent.”

Watch Reinhart’s Cosmopolitan interview in the video below.

Trust, we will all be hexing whoever this man is @Lili Reinhart!#AlexandraShipp#LolaTung#VictoriaPedretti#ForbiddenFruits
title_zh: 莉莉·萊因哈特(Lili Reinhart)表示，一位“男性導演在片場走到我面前，說：‘只要稍微收腹就好’”。
content_zh:
作者：扎克·夏夫(Zack Sharf)

數位新聞總監

《河谷鎮》(Riverdale) 和《禁果》(Forbidden Fruits) 演員莉莉·萊因哈特(Lili Reinhart) 最近參加了《時尚》(Cosmopolitan) 雜誌的視頻訪談，並透露一位男性導演曾在拍攝間隙告訴她要「稍微收腹一下」。萊因哈特並未透露這位男性導演的名字。

在她的《禁果》共演者洛拉·唐(Lola Tung)、維多利亞·佩德雷提(Victoria Pedretti) 和亞歷山德拉·希普(Alexandra Shipp) 的陪伴下，萊因哈特被問到「她個人感受到的演技建議」。她毫不猶豫地回答：「當一位男性導演走到我面前，靜靜地傾身過來說，‘只要稍微收腹一下。’」

這一揭露讓《禁果》的演員們驚訝不已，佩德雷提驚呼：「天啊。他的名字是什麼？他的地址是什麼？」唐大喊：「該詛咒了！該詛咒了！」當萊因哈特表示她稍後會私下告訴劇組成員導演的名字時，希普催促道：「說出他的名字！」

多年來，萊因哈特一直公開談論她與身體畸形症的鬥爭。她在《CW》的《河谷鎮》中飾演貝蒂·庫珀(Betty Cooper) 時因此發展出飲食失調。

「我真的不喜歡看第六季的影像或照片，因為我知道99%的想法都是關於我的身體，」她去年告訴《自我雜誌》(Self Magazine)。「那整天或那場戲我完全是脫離狀態，因為我內心的對話就是……‘你的身體在改變。’」

她在2023年因在X平台上發文而成為頭條新聞：「我希望主流媒體能有更多平均身材的女性手臂代表。我的身體畸形症一直在發作，因為我覺得我的手臂需要減半。對於我們大多數人來說，這些纖細的手臂只有在你是個真正的青少年時才能達到。」

觀看萊因哈特的《時尚》訪談視頻如下。

相信我，我們都會詛咒這位男性 @莉莉·萊因哈特(Lili Reinhart)! #亞歷山德拉·希普(Alexandra Shipp) #洛拉·唐(Lola Tung) #維多利亞·佩德雷提(Victoria Pedretti) #禁果(Forbidden Fruits)

作者：扎克·夏夫(Zack Sharf)

數位新聞總監

《河谷鎮》(Riverdale) 和《禁果》(Forbidden Fruits) 演員莉莉·萊因哈特(Lili Reinhart) 最近參加了《時尚》(Cosmopolitan) 雜誌的視頻訪談，並透露一位男性導演曾在拍攝間隙告訴她要「稍微收腹一下」。萊因哈特並未透露這位男性導演的名字。
